name: Cisco Catalyst TA Tools
description: MCP tools for managing and querying the Cisco Catalyst Add-on for Splunk
author: cisco-catalyst-ta-setup skill

tools.name: cisco_catalyst_check_health
tools.title: Cisco Catalyst Health Check
tools.description: Check the health status of Cisco Catalyst TA data collection. Shows event counts per index, active inputs, and last event timestamps.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app="TA_cisco_catalyst" disabled=0 | stats count as enabled_inputs | appendcols [| tstats count as catalyst_events where index=catalyst] | appendcols [| tstats count as ise_events where index=ise] | appendcols [| tstats count as sdwan_events where index=sdwan] | appendcols [| tstats count as cv_events where index=cybervision]
examples: How many events are being collected?

tools.name: cisco_catalyst_list_inputs
tools.title: Cisco Catalyst List Inputs
tools.description: List all configured data inputs for the Cisco Catalyst TA with their status.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app="TA_cisco_catalyst" | table title, eai:acl.app, disabled, index | sort title

tools.name: cisco_catalyst_dnac_issues
tools.title: Catalyst Center Issues
tools.description: Show recent Catalyst Center (DNA Center) issues and assurance alerts.
tools.spl: index=catalyst sourcetype="cisco:dnac:issue" | spath | stats count by name, priority, status, siteHierarchy | sort -count

tools.name: cisco_catalyst_dnac_device_health
tools.title: Catalyst Center Device Health
tools.description: Show device health scores from Catalyst Center.
tools.spl: index=catalyst sourcetype="cisco:dnac:devicehealth" | spath | stats latest(overallHealth) as health_score by name, platformId, role, siteHierarchy | sort health_score
examples: Which devices have low health scores?

tools.name: cisco_catalyst_dnac_compliance
tools.title: Catalyst Center Compliance
tools.description: Show device compliance status from Catalyst Center.
tools.spl: index=catalyst sourcetype="cisco:dnac:compliance" | spath | stats count by complianceStatus, deviceName | sort -count

tools.name: cisco_catalyst_dnac_security_advisories
tools.title: Catalyst Center Security Advisories
tools.description: Show security advisories (PSIRTs) from Catalyst Center.
tools.spl: index=catalyst sourcetype="cisco:dnac:securityadvisory" | spath | stats count by advisoryId, sir, detectionType | sort -sir

tools.name: cisco_catalyst_ise_auth_summary
tools.title: ISE Authentication Summary
tools.description: Summarize ISE authentication events by status and policy.
tools.spl: index=ise sourcetype="cisco:ise*" | stats count by sourcetype, _time | timechart span=1h count by sourcetype

tools.name: cisco_catalyst_cybervision_vulnerabilities
tools.title: Cyber Vision Vulnerabilities
tools.description: Show OT vulnerabilities detected by Cisco Cyber Vision.
tools.spl: index=cybervision sourcetype="cisco:cybervision:vulnerabilities" | spath | stats count by cveId, severity, component | sort -severity
